# meok-eu-aia-art-9-rms-mcp

> MEOK EU AI Act Article 9 Risk Management System generator — 4-step iteration (identify / estimate / post-market / mitigate). 12 risk categories. Signed RMS for the Annex IV technical documentation bundle. By MEOK AI Labs.

MCP server by MEOK AI Labs. Framework: fastmcp. Transport: stdio.

## Tools
- start_rms
- identify_risk
- map_mitigation
- log_post_market_observation
- iterate_rms
- validate_rms_completeness
- list_iteration_steps
- sign_rms_chain

## Install
```
pip install meok-eu-aia-art-9-rms-mcp
```

## Links
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/meok-eu-aia-art-9-rms-mcp/
- Docs: https://meok.ai
